item.title: Version 0.1.8
item.description:
Copy pass

Settings card footers, menu bar tooltips, and onboarding subtitles rewritten in plain English. Removed dev jargon (NSRegularExpression, distributed notifications, EdDSA, Tahoe-fallback metadata, threshold). Redundant subtitles dropped.

item.title: Version 0.1.7
item.description:
Top Albums grid

  • Stats → Top Albums now renders as a cover-art grid with rank, play-count badges, hover lift, and click-out to Last.fm
  • Tiles fall back to identity-colored gradient when Last.fm has no cover image, then attempt iTunes Search as a second-chance lookup
  • Cleaner trademark footer in About

item.title: Version 0.1.6
item.description:
Bugfix

  • Fixed the Ignored rules picker label rendering "M / a / t / c / h" vertically. Picker label is now hidden and a properly-sized "Match" prefix label is rendered separately.

item.title: Version 0.1.5
item.description:
Artwork guarantee + cold-launch fixes

  • Artwork is never empty: each track gets an identity-derived colored gradient with its initial as the placeholder. Real album art fades in on top when fetched.
  • Last.fm fallback for artwork: when iTunes Search misses a track (live recordings, niche releases), Scrobblr falls back to Last.fm's track.getInfo.
  • Paused-at-launch position: the menu bar now shows your actual playhead when launched with Music paused mid-track. Previously stuck at 0:00.

item.title: Version 0.1.4
item.description:
Stats window

A native macOS window that shows your music life as Last.fm knows it.

  • Overview with hero tiles for plays, artists, albums, tracks
  • Top Tracks, Top Artists, Top Albums with inline bar charts
  • Period selector (7 days / 1 month / 3 months / 6 months / 1 year / all time)
  • 90-day listening heatmap with busiest-day callout
  • Open from the chart icon in the menu bar dropdown

Also: Settings polish second pass (clearer status chips, dynamic section subtitles, better content filter and ignore-list layouts).

item.title: Version 0.1.3
item.description:
Now Playing, Loved Tracks, and polish

  • Now Playing macOS notification on track change (opt-in, Settings → General)
  • Loved tracks card in Settings → Activity, with links to each track on Last.fm
  • Two-Mac warning: menu bar surfaces when another client is also scrobbling your account
  • Tightened copy across the app. No more verbose footer paragraphs.
  • 9 test suites (added engine candidate / rule tests)

item.title: Version 0.1.2
item.description:
Take Control

  • Pause scrobbling for 30 min, 1 hour, 3 hours, until tomorrow, or indefinitely
  • Ignored artists and tracks with exact or regex matching
  • Custom scrobble threshold sliders
  • Smart content filter for podcasts, audiobooks, and music videos
  • Un-love: heart toggle now reverses
  • Manual "Submit now" button in Activity

item.title: Version 0.1.1
item.description:
Initial public release

  • Bring-your-own-key Last.fm credentials
  • Sparkle 2 EdDSA-signed auto-updates
  • 4-step onboarding with deferred permission prompts
  • Custom-drawn app icon and refined menu bar UX
  • Love (heart) tracks from the menu bar
  • Daily and weekly scrobble totals in Activity
  • Diagnostics export for support
  • Sleep and network-aware submission queue
  • Notification-driven playback (no MediaRemote dependency)
